zotero.abstractNote: We consider the problem of certifying the robustness of a neural network against adversarial perturbations. While most existing work focuses on a specific lp-norm, we propose a method to certify robustness against all lp-norms for p = 1 simultaneously. Our approach is based on the observation that for a fixed lp-norm, the minimal perturbation is related to the dual norm. We derive a convex relaxation of the robust classification problem that provides a lower bound on the minimal perturbation for any lp-norm with p = 1. We show that our method is computationally efficient and provides tight bounds on several benchmark datasets.
